LCC-HS11-L1-1400P-HSSCIENG1112-CPO-IFN-02 • HS Science: Engineering Design 11-12 • Evaluating Competing Solutions and Tradeoffs

The Fire We Tend

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy at a school forum. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main disagreement between the two students?
2QUESTION 2: According to the boy, why should the machine crews go in first?
3QUESTION 3: What does the girl's final turn suggest about why she rejects the boy's plan?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Locate the decision the girl frames at the start, the reason the boy gives in the middle for putting machines first, and the historical concern the girl raises at the end about who leads the work. Note how the three pieces connect across the whole exchange.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.6  |  HS-ETS1-3  |  HS Science: Engineering Design 11-12: Evaluating Competing Solutions and Tradeoffs
